title: Squirrel Removal in Massapequa, NY | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Massapequa, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Nassau County. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels are common in Massapequa's tree-lined neighborhoods, but when they invade your attic or walls, they can cause serious damage to insulation, wiring, and structural components. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Massapequa and surrounding Long Island communities. Our humane removal process includes trapping, exclusion, cleanup, and prevention to protect your home from future infestations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Massapequa homeowners with fast, humane, and effective squirrel removal solutions. Our licensed technicians use proven exclusion methods and offer warranty-backed services to ensure squirrels don't return to your property.
localContext: Massapequa's mature oak and maple trees, charming single-family homes near Massapequa Lake, and proximity to the Massapequa Preserve create ideal habitats for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and crawl spaces. Properties near Unqua Road, Sunrise Highway, and the waterfront areas are particularly susceptible to squirrel activity during fall and winter months when these animals seek warm nesting sites.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Massapequa?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Massapequa typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, entry point sealing, and cleanup services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Massapequa home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning or evening hours, visible entry holes near your roofline or soffits, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. If you notice any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, eco-friendly methods compliant with New York State wildlife regulations. Our process involves live trapping and relocation when permitted, one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, and thorough sealing of entry points. We never use harmful poisons or inhumane traps.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Massapequa property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Massapequa residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We'll set traps immediately and begin exclusion work to prevent new squirrels from entering while we safely remove the existing ones.
